Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.autoTacticPreference

Interface IAutoTacticPreference

All Known Implementing Classes:
AutoTacticPreference, POMTacticPreference, PostTacticPreference
public interface IAutoTacticPreference
Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ITactic
    getDefaultComposedTactic()
    Return the tactic that is the composition of the default tactics.
    ITacticDescriptor
    getDefaultDescriptor()
    Returns the descriptor of the default tactic.
    ITactic
    getSelectedComposedTactic()
    Return the tactic that is the composition of the selected tactics.
    boolean
    isEnabled()
    Check if the tactic container is currently enable or not.
    void
    setEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Enable/Disable the tactic container.
    void
    setSelectedDescriptor(ITacticDescriptor tacticDesc)
    Sets selected descriptor to the given tactic descriptor.

  • Method Details

    • getDefaultDescriptor

      ITacticDescriptor getDefaultDescriptor()
      Returns the descriptor of the default tactic.
      Returns:
      the descriptor of the default tactic
      Since:
      3.0

    • setEnabled

      void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enable/Disable the tactic container.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable the container, false to disable the container

    • isEnabled

      boolean isEnabled()
      Check if the tactic container is currently enable or not.
      Returns:
      true if enable, false otherwise.

    • getSelectedComposedTactic

      ITactic getSelectedComposedTactic()
      Return the tactic that is the composition of the selected tactics.

      Returns:
      a tactic ITactic.

    • getDefaultComposedTactic

      ITactic getDefaultComposedTactic()
      Return the tactic that is the composition of the default tactics.
      Returns:
      a tactic ITactic.

    • setSelectedDescriptor

      void setSelectedDescriptor(ITacticDescriptor tacticDesc)
      Sets selected descriptor to the given tactic descriptor.
      Parameters:
      tacticDesc - a tactic descriptor
      Since:
      3.0
